title: Infrastructure Core and Philanthropy
subtitle: A support model for staffing, translation, coordination, and continuity
summary: A generalized public entry describing how a focused SignWriting infrastructure core and philanthropic support could stabilize existing tools, standards, data, and international access work.
synopsis: Grants are essential for research, but they often leave continuity, staffing, translation, and infrastructure follow-through underfunded. This entry generalizes the infrastructure-core idea: a small focused support unit for standards, software, data, translation, access, and coordination, with philanthropy treated as a bridge that complements grants rather than replacing them.
